description: Solo Arena Mode V1 - Single-player PvE draft mode with AI opponents, boss relics, Elo difficulty scaling, and run persistence

userStories.title: Create ArenaDraftEngine - rarity rolls and card pool filtering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the core draft engine that rolls rarity per pick and filters the card pool by class attributes and copy limits.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/arena/arena_draft_engine.gd with class_name ArenaDraftEngine
Implement static roll_rarity() -> String that returns 'common' (~60%), 'rare' (~25%), 'epic' (~10%), or 'legendary' (~2.2%) based on weighted random roll
Implement static get_card_pool(attribute_ids: Array, card_database: Dictionary) -> Array that returns all collectible cards matching the class's attributes or Neutral

Implement static get_pick_options(rarity: String, card_pool: Array, current_deck: Array, count: int) -> Array that returns 'count' random cards of the given rarity, respecting copy limits (unique max 1, regular max 3)
If fewer than 'count' cards of the rolled rarity are available, fill remaining slots from the next lower rarity
Card pool excludes non-collectible cards (cards where collectible != true)
Neutral cards (empty attribute list) are always included in the pool regardless of class selection
userStories.notes: Pure static utility class. Card database is the existing card_by_id dictionary loaded from card data JSON files.

userStories.title: Create ArenaDraftEngine - AI draft with quality scaling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the AI draft function that builds opponent decks with configurable quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Add static draft_ai_deck(attribute_ids: Array, card_database: Dictionary, deck_size: int, quality: float) -> Array to ArenaDraftEngine
quality parameter ranges from 0.0 (random) to 1.0 (best possible)
At quality 0.0, AI picks randomly from available options each round
At quality 1.0, AI evaluates cards by: stats-for-cost ratio, keyword value, and synergy with already-picked cards
Card evaluation considers: total stats (attack + health) vs magicka cost, presence of keywords (Guard, Ward, Drain, Breakthrough add value)
Curve awareness: at higher quality, AI penalizes picks that would create too many cards at the same cost
Synergy awareness: at higher quality, AI gives bonus score to cards sharing creature types or keywords with already-drafted cards
Returns an array of card entries [{card_id, quantity}] representing the drafted deck
userStories.notes: Quality interpolates between random picks and evaluated picks. Use lerp between random score and evaluated score weighted by quality parameter.

userStories.title: Add ArenaDraftEngine tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for the draft engine covering rarity rolls, card pool filtering, pick options, and AI drafting.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/arena_draft_engine_runner.gd following existing test runner pattern
Test roll_rarity() produces valid rarity strings over many rolls
Test get_card_pool() returns only cards matching given attributes plus Neutral cards
Test get_card_pool() excludes non-collectible cards
Test get_pick_options() returns correct number of cards of the specified rarity
Test get_pick_options() respects copy limits - unique cards max 1, regular cards max 3
Test draft_ai_deck() returns a deck of the requested size
Test draft_ai_deck() at quality 1.0 produces a deck with reasonable magicka curve (not all cards at same cost)
Tests pass when run with: godot --headless --script tests/arena_draft_engine_runner.gd
userStories.notes: Use preload() for scripts. Test with real card database loaded from JSON files. Some tests may need multiple runs to verify statistical properties.

userStories.title: Create ArenaRunManager - state machine and run lifecycle
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the run manager that tracks run state, win/loss record, and manages transitions between phases.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/arena/arena_run_manager.gd with class_name ArenaRunManager
Define run states as enum: CLASS_SELECT, DRAFTING, READY_FOR_MATCH, IN_MATCH, POST_MATCH_PICK, RUN_COMPLETE
Implement start_run(class_attributes: Array) that initializes a new run with the selected class
Implement complete_draft(deck: Array) that transitions from DRAFTING to READY_FOR_MATCH
Implement start_match() that transitions from READY_FOR_MATCH to IN_MATCH and returns opponent config (attribute_ids, deck_size, quality)
Implement record_win() that increments wins, transitions to POST_MATCH_PICK (or RUN_COMPLETE if boss defeated)
Implement record_loss() that increments losses, transitions to READY_FOR_MATCH (or RUN_COMPLETE if 3rd loss)
Implement complete_post_match_pick(card) that adds card to deck and transitions to READY_FOR_MATCH
Implement abandon_run() that transitions to RUN_COMPLETE from any state
Opponent N has deck_size = 29 + N (matches player deck growth)
Opponent attributes avoid repeating the same class within a run where possible
Track current_match (1-9), wins, losses, selected class, and current deck
userStories.notes: Non-static class since it holds run state. Boss is match 9. Run ends on 3 losses or after match 9 (win or loss).

userStories.title: Create ArenaRunManager - persistence (save/load run state)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need run state to persist to disk so players can resume runs across game sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add save_run() method that writes current run state to user://arena/run.json
Add static load_run() -> ArenaRunManager that restores a run from user://arena/run.json, or returns null if no saved run
Add static has_active_run() -> bool that checks if a saved run file exists
Add clear_run() that deletes the saved run file
save_run() is called automatically after: complete_draft, record_win, record_loss, complete_post_match_pick
Saved state includes: state enum, class_attributes, deck (with post-win additions), wins, losses, current_match, boss_relic
Creates user://arena/ directory if it does not exist
clear_run() is called on abandon_run() and when run completes
userStories.notes: Similar pattern to DeckPersistence but for a single run file. JSON format for readability.

userStories.title: Add ArenaRunManager tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for run lifecycle, state transitions, and persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/arena_run_manager_runner.gd following existing test runner pattern
Test full winning run: start -> draft -> 8 wins with picks -> boss win -> RUN_COMPLETE
Test 3-loss run: start -> draft -> mix of wins/losses -> 3rd loss -> RUN_COMPLETE
Test 3rd loss on boss: verify run completes correctly
Test opponent deck size increases with match number (29+N)
Test save/load round-trip preserves all run state
Test has_active_run() returns true after save, false after clear
Test abandon_run() clears saved state and sets RUN_COMPLETE
Tests pass when run with: godot --headless --script tests/arena_run_manager_runner.gd
userStories.notes: Clean up user://arena/ test files after tests complete.

userStories.title: Create ArenaEloManager - Elo persistence and difficulty distribution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Elo manager that persists player Elo and determines opponent difficulty distribution for each run.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/arena/arena_elo_manager.gd with class_name ArenaEloManager
Implement static get_elo() -> int that reads from user://arena/elo.dat, defaulting to 1200 if file does not exist
Implement static save_elo(elo: int) that writes to user://arena/elo.dat
Implement static update_elo_after_run(current_elo: int, total_wins: int) -> int that computes new Elo based on wins
Elo is clamped to range 800-2000
Implement static get_opponent_difficulties(elo: int) -> Array[float] that returns 8 difficulty values (0.0-1.0) for matches 1-8
At Elo 1200: 2 weak (quality ~0.2-0.3), 5 average (quality ~0.4-0.6), 2 strong (quality ~0.7-0.8) opponents
Difficulties are arranged in ascending order (easiest first, hardest last)
Higher player Elo shifts the distribution upward (more strong opponents, fewer weak ones)
Creates user://arena/ directory if it does not exist
userStories.notes: Static utility class. Elo update formula should be simple: gain more for high-win runs, lose for low-win runs. Quality values map to ArenaDraftEngine.draft_ai_deck() quality parameter.

userStories.title: Add ArenaEloManager tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for Elo persistence, update formula, and difficulty distribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/arena_elo_manager_runner.gd following existing test runner pattern
Test default Elo is 1200 when no file exists
Test save/load round-trip preserves Elo value
Test update_elo_after_run increases Elo for high-win runs (7+ wins)
Test update_elo_after_run decreases Elo for low-win runs (0-2 wins)
Test Elo is clamped at 800 minimum and 2000 maximum
Test get_opponent_difficulties returns 8 values in ascending order
Test difficulties at Elo 1200 have expected distribution (2 weak, 5 average, 2 strong)
Test higher Elo produces higher average difficulty values
Tests pass when run with: godot --headless --script tests/arena_elo_manager_runner.gd
userStories.notes: Clean up user://arena/ test files after tests complete.

userStories.title: Create BossRelicSystem - 6 relic effects
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the boss relic system that defines and applies 6 different relic effects to boss matches.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/arena/boss_relic_system.gd with class_name BossRelicSystem
Define enum BossRelic: IRON, CORUNDUM, MOONSTONE, QUICKSILVER, EBONY, MALACHITE
Implement static pick_random_relic() -> BossRelic
Implement static get_relic_name(relic: BossRelic) -> String
Implement static get_relic_description(relic: BossRelic) -> String that returns human-readable effect description
Implement static apply_relic_to_match_config(relic: BossRelic, config: Dictionary) -> Dictionary that modifies match configuration
IRON: sets boss health to 80 (config.boss_health = 80)
CORUNDUM: sets config.boss_creature_attack_bonus = 1
MOONSTONE: sets config.boss_rune_break_card = true
QUICKSILVER: sets config.player_start_of_turn_damage = 1
EBONY: sets config.boss_city_gates = true (0/6 creature blocking other lane)
MALACHITE: sets config.boss_starting_guards = [{attack: 0, health: 4, guard: true}] in each lane
userStories.notes: Config dictionary approach allows match setup code to read relic effects without coupling to the relic system. Actual effect implementation happens in match integration (later story).

userStories.title: Add BossRelicSystem tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for relic selection, descriptions, and match config application.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/boss_relic_system_runner.gd following existing test runner pattern
Test pick_random_relic() returns valid BossRelic enum values
Test get_relic_name() returns non-empty string for all 6 relics
Test get_relic_description() returns non-empty string for all 6 relics
Test IRON relic sets boss_health to 80 in config
Test CORUNDUM relic sets boss_creature_attack_bonus to 1 in config
Test MOONSTONE relic sets boss_rune_break_card to true in config
Test QUICKSILVER relic sets player_start_of_turn_damage to 1 in config
Test EBONY relic sets boss_city_gates to true in config
Test MALACHITE relic sets boss_starting_guards in config
Tests pass when run with: godot --headless --script tests/boss_relic_system_runner.gd
userStories.notes: Pure logic tests, no file I/O needed.

userStories.title: Create ArenaClassSelectScreen UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to select from 3 randomly offered classes to start my arena run.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ui/arena/arena_class_select_screen.gd with class_name ArenaClassSelectScreen extending Control
Screen title: 'Choose Your Class'
Display 3 class options as buttons/cards in a horizontal row, centered on screen
Each option shows class name and two attribute names/icons
3 classes are randomly selected from the 10 available dual-attribute classes
Clicking a class option emits signal class_selected(attribute_ids: Array) with the two attribute IDs
Built programmatically with no .tscn file
Back button to return to main menu
userStories.notes: Load class data from attribute_class_registry.json. Simple functional layout, no animations.

userStories.title: Create ArenaDraftScreen UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to draft cards by choosing 1 of 3 options each pick, with my deck visible in a sidebar.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ui/arena/arena_draft_screen.gd with class_name ArenaDraftScreen extending Control
Center/top area displays 3 full CardDisplayComponent renders showing the current pick options
Right sidebar shows a compact scrollable card list of the deck-in-progress (same component pattern as deck editor right column)
Below the deck list: MagickaCurveChart widget showing current deck distribution
Pick counter shows 'Pick X of 30' (or 'Bonus Pick' for post-win picks)
Clicking a card option adds it to the deck and advances to the next pick
After all picks complete, emits signal draft_complete(deck: Array)
Supports post-win pick mode: initialize with existing deck, show 1 pick, emit signal on completion
Built programmatically with no .tscn file
userStories.notes: Reuse CardDisplayComponent for card renders and compact deck list pattern from DeckEditorScreen. Cannot skip picks.

userStories.title: Create ArenaRunStatusScreen UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see my current run progress and start the next match or abandon the run.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ui/arena/arena_run_status_screen.gd with class_name ArenaRunStatusScreen extending Control
Display win/loss record (e.g. 'Wins: 3  Losses: 1')
Display current match number (e.g. 'Next Match: 5 of 9')
When next match is 9, show 'Boss Match' indicator
Show boss relic name and description when next match is the boss
Compact deck list with hover preview (same component as draft sidebar)
'Fight' button emits signal fight_pressed
'Abandon Run' button with confirmation dialog emits signal abandon_pressed
Built programmatically with no .tscn file
userStories.notes: Reuse compact deck list component. Confirmation dialog for abandon uses same pattern as deck delete confirmation.

userStories.title: Create ArenaMatchResultScreen and ArenaRunSummaryScreen UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see match results after each fight and a run summary when my run ends.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ui/arena/arena_match_result_screen.gd with class_name ArenaMatchResultScreen extending Control
Displays 'Victory!' or 'Defeat' message prominently
'Continue' button emits signal continue_pressed
Create src/ui/arena/arena_run_summary_screen.gd with class_name ArenaRunSummaryScreen extending Control
Displays final win/loss record
'Return to Main Menu' button emits signal return_pressed
Both screens built programmatically with no .tscn files
userStories.notes: Simple overlay/screen with centered text and button. Match result is shown after every match; run summary only at run end.

userStories.title: Create ArenaController - screen navigation and match orchestration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a controller that wires all arena screens together and orchestrates the full run flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ui/arena/arena_controller.gd with class_name ArenaController extending Control
On enter: check ArenaRunManager.has_active_run() - if yes, load run and show RunStatus; if no, show ClassSelect
ClassSelect -> class_selected: create ArenaRunManager, start ArenaDraftEngine draft, show DraftScreen
DraftScreen -> draft_complete: call run_manager.complete_draft(), show RunStatusScreen
RunStatusScreen -> fight_pressed: get opponent config from run_manager, use ArenaDraftEngine to build AI deck, configure and start match
Match end -> victory: call run_manager.record_win(), show MatchResult
Match end -> defeat: call run_manager.record_loss(), show MatchResult
MatchResult -> continue: if run complete show RunSummary; if post-win pick needed show DraftScreen in pick mode; else show RunStatus
Post-win pick -> complete: call run_manager.complete_post_match_pick(), show RunStatus
RunSummary -> return: update Elo via ArenaEloManager, emit signal return_to_menu
Abandon -> confirmed: call run_manager.abandon_run(), emit return_to_menu
userStories.notes: Central orchestration point. Uses ArenaRunManager for state, ArenaDraftEngine for drafts, ArenaEloManager for difficulty, BossRelicSystem for boss config.

userStories.title: Integrate boss relic effects into match setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need boss relic effects to actually modify the match when fighting the boss.
acceptanceCriteria: When ArenaController starts a boss match (match 9), apply relic config to match setup
IRON: Set boss starting health to 80
CORUNDUM: After boss creatures are summoned, apply +1 attack modifier
MOONSTONE: When boss rune breaks, add a random 0-cost card to boss hand
QUICKSILVER: At start of player's turn, deal 1 damage to player
EBONY: Place a 0/6 City Gates creature in one lane at match start with effect preventing opponent summons in other lane
MALACHITE: Place a 0/4 Guard creature in each lane at match start
Boss relic name displayed during boss match (e.g. in match UI header)
userStories.notes: Some relics (IRON, MALACHITE, EBONY) modify initial state. Others (CORUNDUM, MOONSTONE, QUICKSILVER) need ongoing triggers. Integration depends on existing match/board systems.

userStories.title: Add Arena button to main menu and wire navigation
userStories.description: As a player, I want to access Solo Arena from the main menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Arena' button to main menu between 'Match' and 'Deck Builder' buttons
Arena button uses the same visual style as existing menu buttons
Clicking Arena button creates and shows ArenaController
ArenaController return_to_menu signal navigates back to main menu
Main menu properly cleans up ArenaController when returning
userStories.notes: Follow existing navigation pattern from main menu to other screens (match, deck builder).
